revision.comment: Bot: cleanup/reformat
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} register, 25 shrines are listed: 1 {{ill|Shikinaisha Taisha|de|Shikinaisha Taisha|ja|式内大社|zh|式内大社|12=draft}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 {{ill|Shikinaisha Shōsha|de|Shikinaisha Shōsha|ja|式内小社|zh|式内小社|12=draft}} (Minor Shrines). {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} register, 25 shrines are listed: 1 {{ill|Shikinaisha Taisha|de|Shikinaisha Taisha|ja|式内大社|zh|式内大社|12=draft}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 {{ill|Shikinaisha Shōsha|de|Shikinaisha Shōsha|ja|式内小社|zh|式内小社|12=draft}} (Minor Shrines). {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Translated pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} register, 25 shrines are listed: 1 {{ill|Shikinaisha Taisha|de|Shikinaisha Taisha|ja|式内大社|zh|式内大社|12=draft}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 {{ill|Shikinaisha Shōsha|de|Shikinaisha Shōsha|ja|式内小社|zh|式内小社|12=draft}} (Minor Shrines). {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}} register, 25 shrines are listed: 1 {{ill|Shikinaisha Taisha|de|Shikinaisha Taisha|ja|式内大社|zh|式内大社|qq=draft}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 {{ill|Shikinaisha Shōsha|de|Shikinaisha Shōsha|ja|式内小社|zh|式内小社|qq=draft}} (Minor Shrines). {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}} register, 25 shrines are listed: 1 {{ill|Shikinaisha Taisha|de|Shikinaisha Taisha|ja|式内大社|zh|式内大社|qq=draft}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 {{ill|Shikinaisha Shōsha|de|Shikinaisha Shōsha|ja|式内小社|zh|式内小社|qq=draft}} (Minor Shrines). {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Taisha|de|Shikinaisha Taisha|ja|式内大社|zh|式内大社|qq=draft}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 {{ill|Shikinaisha Shōsha|de|Shikinaisha Shōsha|ja|式内小社|zh|式内小社|qq=draft}} (Minor Shrines). {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]]<!--Doing this to bump these pages because my history retrieval attempts have led to category caching errors-->[[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} register, 25 shrines are listed: 1 {{ill|Shikinaisha Taisha|de|Shikinaisha Taisha|ja|式内大社|zh|式内大社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha Taisha|qq=}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} register, 25 shrines are listed: 1 {{ill|Shikinaisha Taisha|de|Shikinaisha Taisha|ja|式内大社|zh|式内大社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha Taisha|qq=}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 Or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Iga Province|Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Iga Province|Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} register, 25 shrines are listed: 1 {{ill|Shikinaisha Taisha|de|Shikinaisha Taisha|ja|式内大社|zh|式内大社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha Taisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名神大社}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 {{ill|Shikinaisha Shōsha|de|Shikinaisha Shōsha|ja|式内小社|zh|式内小社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha Shōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳}} (Minor Shrines). {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Iga Province|Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Iga Province|Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki redirects to 名神大社}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 {{ill|Shikinaisha Shōsha|de|Shikinaisha Shōsha|ja|式内小社|zh|式内小社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha Shōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11380647]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Iga Province|Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Iga Province|Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki redirects to 名神大社}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 {{ill|Shikinaisha Shōsha|de|Shikinaisha Shōsha|ja|式内小社|zh|式内小社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha Shōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Iga Province|Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Iga Province|Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} register, 25 shrines are listed: 1 {{ill|Shikinaisha Taisha|de|Shikinaisha Taisha|ja|式内大社|zh|式内大社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha Taisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名神大社|1=Myojin Taisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9610964}} (Grand Shrine) and 24 {{ill|Shikinaisha Shōsha|de|Shikinaisha Shōsha|ja|式内小社|zh|式内小社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha Shōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11064932}} (Minor Shrines). {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki revision.text:
{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11380647]]} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}
On this page we will also cover the {ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The ''Engishiki'' counts **25 shikinaisha** in the province – **24 shosha** and **1 taisha**.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:43, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Prov !! Name !! Kana !! Rank !! {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11380647]]
[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:18, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Prov !! Name !! Kana !! Rank !! [[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:52, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:37, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:47, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:48, 1 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:12, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11380647]]
[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:45, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:11, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:13, 4 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:20, 4 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:46, 4 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 12:20, 4 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:21, 5 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11380647]]
[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:13, 5 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 17:26, 5 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:11, 6 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:41, 6 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:25, 6 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:20, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:45, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11380647]]
[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:43, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Iga Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Iga Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 25 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 24 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:06, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:06, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:06, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:06, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:06, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shōsha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shōsha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[:ja:伊賀国の式内社一覧]]

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:43, 16 February 2026 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Iga Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 25 Shikinaisha in the province – 24 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.
